Usage Guidelines

Terms of Use

Please review the terms of using Font Converter Hub. By accessing our tools, you agree to these straightforward guidelines.

Service Provided "As-Is"

Font Converter Hub is a free developer utility. All text conversion features, tools, and visual displays are provided "as-is" and "as-available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to suitability for a specific task.

No Guarantee of Conversion Accuracy

While we continuously test and improve our character-mapping algorithms, Devanagari script conversions (especially concerning complex joint-letters, matras, and half-consonants) may occasionally contain rendering variations or errors. We do not guarantee 100% conversion accuracy.

Responsibility to Verify Output

It is the user's sole responsibility to proofread and verify the accuracy of all converted text prior to publishing, printing, submitting to government portals, or using it in commercial work.

Limitation of Liability

Under no circumstances shall Font Converter Hub, its developers, or contributors be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages (including, but not limited to, loss of data, typesetting errors, project delays, or financial losses) arising out of the use or inability to use this site.

Acceptable & Commercial Use

You are fully permitted to use the text generated by this website for any personal, educational, governmental, or commercial projects without attribution or fees.

If you encounter mapping issues or have questions regarding these terms, please contact us via support@fontconverterhub.com.
